title: The Ancient Kingdom’s Shadow
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Kid, Bonney, Unknown person #5, Luffy, Unknown person #6 as Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.
scene: Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Consider it like using the same library!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For example, if every person in the world can access my brain...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's as if all mankind has acquired my knowledge!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Also, if mankind reciprocically can update the punk records,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is possible to create a sea of knowledge far beyond my brain

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This "Brain" will someday can be share with all mankind!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So that means every researcher in the world can learn from it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Of course!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Uwoooh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Will there be any inconvenience if you get into my thoughts?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You are a sharp one, "knight of the sea" jinbe!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But science cannot move forward if you worry about that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Pepepe Pepper!!

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: You never change vegapunk!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You are willing to sacrifice for the sake of science!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's why you transformed my father into an emotionless combat weapon!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop Bonney! That saber was a failed product!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shut up! I just tested its sharpness earlier!

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Just change my father back to normal!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Sheen

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: If your answer is "No"....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: To attract a large number of insects!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: BONNEY!! Please think again! If you kill him,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You will end up making more enemies than you could imagine!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Just turn off the switch, Bonney!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That beam function is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: GYAAAAAAA!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: 01 Bonney!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look what I found, a large Stag beetle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That's not a large stage beetle!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Are you not worried about her fainting?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That makes sense.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Her reason to kill me makes sense.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm saved because the weapon she picked is a failed product...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By the way, you guys recently went to Wano right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: There was a rumor...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it true that there's another dragon besides Kaidou?

summary: This part advances the Egghead / Vegapunk Truth through 38 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
